step1.title: Effortless Tracking
step1.description: Ditch the notebook. Log your sets, reps, and weights in seconds and visualize your strength gains over time.

step2.title: Smart Nutrition
step2.description: Log meals in seconds with AI scanning or our massive database. Understanding your fuel is the key to peak performance.

step3.title: One App, Total Control
step3.description: Connect the dots between your diet and your lifts. See exactly how your nutrition fuels your strength gains with unified progress charts.

step4.title: Let's Get Personal
step4.description: To tailor your journey and track your gains with precision, we'd love to know a bit more about your fitness history.

personalInfo.title: Set Personal Information
personalInfo.trackCycleDescription: Sync your performance and nutrition with your hormonal phases.

anchor.title: Last Period
anchor.description: When did your last period start? This helps us calibrate your current phase.

birthControl.title: Hormonal Birth Control
birthControl.description: Are you currently using any hormonal birth control? This affects hormonal phase predictions.

length.title: Cycle Length
length.description: How long is your typical cycle and period duration?

goal.title: Sync Goal
goal.description: What is your primary focus for hormonal syncing?
goal.symptomsDescription: Focus on comfort and recovery during shifts.
goal.energyDescription: Anticipate lows and adjust intensity accordingly.

connectGoogle.title: Connect Your Google Account
connectGoogle.welcomeDescription: You're connected — personalize your experience before continuing.

healthConnect.description: Sync your fitness data to Musclog for advanced progress tracking and personalized health insights.
healthConnect.privacyStatement: Musclog values your privacy. Your data is encrypted and used only for your personal analytics.

landing.termsAndPrivacy: By continuing, you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
landing.description: Track your progress with data-driven insights and crush your fitness goals.
landing.migratingPreamble: Upgrading from the previous Musclog — we're bringing your data over.

setGoals.title: Smart Goal
setGoals.description: We use the Mifflin–St Jeor and Katch–McArdle equations to estimate your metabolism, then your activity level and goals to set your calorie and macro targets.
setGoals.missingData: Please complete your fitness details first so we can calculate your plan.
